title: diamerizo #1266
definition:
1) to cleave asunder, cut in pieces
 2) to be divided into opposing parts, to be at variance, in dissension
 3) to distribute
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to cleave asunder, cut in pieces
 2) to be divided into opposing parts, to be at variance, in dissension
 3) to distribute

    NASB:  to distribute, to divide:
